acceptedAnswer.text: Same as malpractice; competence key in TX.
acceptedAnswer.description: Standard malpractice; no AI-specific yet. Texas emphasizes competence. Key factors: (1) Ethics on tech; (2) Venue Harris County fast; (3) Expert local. Check updates.
